content.en:
After a while, the meeting was over.

Ye Tian did not have foreign silver sand on his body, so he did not participate in the transaction between the great ancestors.

After going back, Ye Tian thought about this meeting.

"It turns out that this is a hopeless land, just a small piece of territory in the Xuanqi Territory, no wonder I didn't get much information before, and I didn't know much about the farther territory, it turns out that this place is surrounded by the Voidless Galaxy, and it is difficult for the forces of the outside world to come!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And he finally understood why there weren't many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Hopeless Land, the number was very scarce, and those high-level immeasurable lifeforms were also very low-key.

The reason is because it is too difficult to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform in a hopeless land, and it can even be said that it is impossible to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

"Becoming a high-level immeasurable lifeform should require some kind of special resources, and there is no one here in the Hopeless Land!

Ye Tian thought so.

However, he thought that if he wanted to break through to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, he would have to leave the hopeless land.

But once you leave the Hopeless Land, it will not be easy to travel back and forth between the Genki Territory and the Silent Black Sea.

Of course, that doesn't make a difference.

He only needs to take a real body with him, and he doesn't need to transport resources.

After all, the strength of that real body copy body has increased, and the other copy bodies have also improved.

"It's best to leave the hopeless land with those great ancestors, so that at least there is an identity, even if you leave the hopeless land, there are traces to follow, and the identity will not be suspected!"

He doesn't want to give up his identity as a long-term businessman!

Although it is said that if you enter the territory outside the hopeless land, you can also reproduce other great ancestors, but the relationship network of each great ancestor is very close, and it is easy to expose your identity.

The ability to replicate the body is not unbreakable, and his identity as the Great Ancestor of the Xuan Ming Dynasty has gone to the hopeless land, and it is absolutely impossible to be recognized, so why give up this identity!

After thinking about it, he decided to compete for a spot.

Subsequently, he began to inquire about the information of the Alien Silver Sand, and finally figured out what the Alien Silver Sand.

Alien silver sand is a kind of silver sand grain, but it contains a special energy, and each grain of sand contains terrifying gravity, even ordinary Dao ancestors can hardly carry the power of a grain of sand, and they will easily be crushed by the alien silver sand.

Therefore, once you see the heterosilver sand, it is easy to identify.

In general, isosilver sand can only be found on the seabed or in the veins at the bottom of the river, and if there is a lot of heterosilver sand, it may even form isosilver sand sand deposits.

There are not many rivers and oceans in the hopeless land, and most of the rivers, no matter how special they are, may never produce heterosilver sand, so the production of heterosilver sand is naturally not much.

"At the bottom of the river, is there any silver sand at the bottom of the Milky Way River?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he asked other Great Ancestors and received a positive answer.

For example, the Golden Glass Ancestor must have told Ye Tian: "There is a different silver sand at the bottom of the Milky Way River, and there is a lot of production, and the quantity is innumerable. "

It's a pity that the Voidless Galaxy is too dangerous, and the price paid to mine the Heterosilver Sand at the bottom of the Voidless Galaxy River is too great, even if a large number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms are mobilized, the entire army may be wiped out.

The heterosilver sand obtained from mining is not at all equal to the price paid, so no force is willing to go to the bottom of the empty galaxy to mine heterosilver sand.

"There shouldn't be a way to fuse this kind of thing, and in a short period of time, I don't have the means to collect enough Heterosilver Sand. As for the acquisition of Yiyinsha, my wealth is indeed enough, but I can't find so many great ancestors who are willing to trade to me. Therefore, it is easier to go to the bottom of the Voidless Galaxy River to collect the Alien Silver Sand!"

Immediately, Ye Tian was ready to go to the Voidless Galaxy.

......

After shuttling again and again, Ye Tian finally arrived at the Voidless Galaxy.

The Voidless Milky Way is very special, giving Ye Tian a hollow feeling, it seems to be a river, but every drop of river water is like a star.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the Voidless Galaxy, and was immediately pulled into the Voidless Galaxy, and there was no way to fly on the Voidless Galaxy, let alone travel through time and space.

Here, it is as if time and space do not exist at all.

Once you enter the voidless galaxy, if you don't have a special way, you can only keep falling to the bottom of the river.

I saw that Ye Tian's body kept falling to the bottom of the river, and at this time, the creatures around him appeared, and they all killed Ye Tian.

The strength of these creatures is not strong, it is comparable to the Ninth Order Dao Ancestor, if it is in the outside world, any Great Ancestor can slaughter this group of creatures.

However, the strength exerted by a primary-order immeasurable lifeform Great Ancestor here was not much stronger than that of a ninth-order Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, if an ordinary Great Ancestor entered here, he would definitely be surrounded and killed quickly.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian fought with these creatures, killed them with a wave of his hand, and then tried his best to break free.

"The Voidless Galaxy is really terrifying, even I have to do my best to break free, after the ordinary middle-level immeasurable lifeforms enter, I'm afraid I can't even come out!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The reason why he came out was that he had already sensed the creature of the Voidless Galaxy, and he only needed to copy a Voidless Galactic creature, and then let this creature enter the Voidless Galaxy, which was easier and less likely to be attacked.

Soon, a voidless galactic creature was copied and let Ye Tian throw it in.

......

There is no empty galaxy.

Ye Tian swam here as a creature, and soon came to the bottom of the river.

The creatures at the bottom of the river are even more powerful, but the creatures that are comparable to the Great Ancestor are still very rare, most of them are creatures whose strength is comparable to the Ninth Order Dao Ancestor or even the Eighth Order Dao Ancestor, and the combat power is ordinary and single, not as powerful as the Dao Ancestor in the outside world.

But with the geographical advantage of the empty galaxy, they become very terrifying!

Without the threat of the outside world, Ye Tian was looking for the alien silver sand at the bottom of the Voidless Galaxy River.

Since the Alien Silver Sand was easy to identify, Ye Tian felt that it should not be long before he could find the Alien Silver Sand.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to find the Alien Silver Sand, and there were quite a few of them!

"Found it!"

Ye Tian sensed that there was a grain of sand in an undersea mountain range not far away, and these sand were the different silver sand.

"At least tens of thousands of different silver sands!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
